zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel d'Aubigny於1233年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素時，她的父親William d'Aubigny40歲，母親Albreda Bisset33歲。她和Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1301年6月15日在英國林可爾史爾紐斯亞德享年68歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾紐斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel d'Aubigny was born in 1233, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, her father, William d'Aubigny, was 40 and her mother, Albreda Bisset, was 33. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley. She died on 15 June 1301, in Newstead, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Newstead, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel d'Aubigny est née en 1233, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aubigny, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Albreda Bisset, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley. Elle est décédée le 15 juin 1301, à Newstead, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Newstead, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel d'Aubigny 1233 in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Aubigny 40 und ihre Mutter Albreda Bisset 33. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juni 1301 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Newstead, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Newstead, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley. Morì il 15 giugno 1301, nel Newstead, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Newstead, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Aubignyが1233年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで生まれた時，父William d'Aubignyは40歳，母Albreda Bissetは33歳であった。彼女はSir Robert de Ros III of Helmsleyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1301年6月15日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアニューステアドで68歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアニューステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Aubigny(이)가 1233년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Aubigny(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda Bisset(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 6월 15일 영국 링코실르 뉴스테아드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 뉴스테아드에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel d'Aubigny родилась в 1233 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Aubigny было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Bisset, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Sir Robert de Ros III of Helmsley. Она умерла 15 июня 1301 г. в местности нюстид, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности нюстид, линколншир, Англия.
